query: SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, u.riffUserId, cf.id as freqId, cf.frequencyName, cf.arcType, cf.isDefault FROM users u LEFT JOIN creator_frequencies cf ON cf.userId = u.id AND cf.isDefault = true WHERE u.riffUserId = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.3c7bc1be8a03 --database WKX2kfVZUM23yKDCoTqGRN --execute SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, u.riffUserId, cf.id as freqId, cf.frequencyName, cf.arcType, cf.isDefault FROM users u LEFT JOIN creator_frequencies cf ON cf.userId = u.id AND cf.isDefault = true WHERE u.riffUserId = 1;
